evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: **A powerful, feature-rich email client for your terminal.** Built with Go and the Bubble Tea TUI framework, Matcha brings a beautiful, modern email experience to the command line with support for rich content, multiple accounts, and advanced terminal features.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: Matcha has a built-in plugin system with 35+ community plugins. Browse and install them from the terminal or the [online marketplace](https://docs.matcha.floatpane.com/marketplace).

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: ```bash matcha marketplace # browse plugins in the TUI matcha install <url_or_file> # install a plugin matcha config <plugin_name> # configure an installed plugin ```

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Anyone can submit their own plugin — just add an entry to `plugins/registry.json` and open a PR. [Learn more](https://docs.matcha.floatpane.com/Features/Plugins#submit-your-plugin)

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: **AI Agent Support:** Matcha can be used by autonomous AI agents to send emails on your behalf. The `matcha send` CLI command provides a non-interactive interface for composing and sending emails.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: ```bash matcha send --to alice@example.com --subject "Hello" --body "Sent by my AI agent" ```

evidence.title: BUG: String concatenation with += for crypto status in email view
evidence.excerpt: BUG: String concatenation with += for crypto status in email view (state:closed)

evidence.title: FEAT: Image display support within Zellij (Sixel fallback)
evidence.excerpt: FEAT: Image display support within Zellij (Sixel fallback) (state:open)

evidence.title: v0.35.0
evidence.excerpt: <!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.35.0 --> ## What's Changed ### Performance Improvements * chore: use strings.Builder by @Haroka-74 in https://github.com/floatpane/matcha/pull/1016 ### Continuous Integration * ci: exclude all prereleases by @andrinoff in https://github.com/floatpane/matcha/pull/1015 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/floatpane/matcha/compare/preview-pr1011...v0.35.0 --- This version is also available on **[Snapcraft](https://snapcraft.io/matcha)**, **Homebrew**, **[Flatpak](https://matcha.floatpane.com/matcha.flatpakref)**! View the [installation instructions](https://docs.matcha.floatpane.com/installation) for more details.

evidence.title: nightlyv0
evidence.excerpt: > [!WARNING] > This is an automated nightly build from the latest `master` commit (`6ce2588`). It may be unstable — use stable releases for production. ### Install - **Homebrew:** `brew install floatpane/matcha/matcha-nightly` - **Snapcraft:** `snap install matcha --beta` ### Changes since preview-pr1011 - chore: use strings.Builder (#1016) (6ce2588) - ci: exclude all prereleases (#1015) (a4c620b)
